research_findings: Fast-tracked — 30 queued backlog items existed, research skipped.
proposed_idea: BL-022: Quick onboarding mode — reduce 11 sequential questions to confidence-scored summary with 2-3 exchanges

requirements_verification.evidence: Step 2 maps all repo analysis fields to memory.json fields via structured mapping table
Step 3 presents structured table with Field/Inferred Value/Confidence columns
Low-confidence fields asked as follow-up questions
At most 4 follow-up questions, bundled in single message
Step 2 includes fallback condition for empty repos, Step 2b provides full interview
Flow is 3 exchanges max, down from 11+

lessons_learned: No test infrastructure in this repo — pure prompt/skill definition repo
Revenue model and git tracking always have low confidence from repo analysis
validation_notes: No existing test suite. Shell scripts pass bash -n syntax check. Changes scoped to Onboarding Phase Steps 2-3 only.
memory_updates: Added quick onboarding feature to features and feature_history
Added cycle 3 past decision with lessons
